message:
feat(trace): add replay divergence diagnostics module

Implement structured divergence reporting for trace replay debugging.
When a replay diverges from a recorded trace, produces diagnostic reports
with minimal divergent prefix isolation, first-violation identification,
affected entity analysis, and context windows.

- Add divergence.rs with structured DivergenceReport and supporting types
- Support JSON and text output formats for CI integration
- Register module in trace/mod.rs and re-export public types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
